introSection:
Drakko: The Flying Beast is a steel launched roller coaster located at Salitre Mágico in Bogotá, Cundinamarca, Colombia. The ride originally operated as Zombie Ride at Bosque Mágico in Guadalupe, Nuevo León, Mexico.

Built by Premier Rides, it is the fourth clone of Superman Ultimate Flight at Six Flags Discovery Kingdom.

The support structure was fabricated by Valley Iron.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Unlike all other iterations, this ride has two trains and a sliding station, while operating as Zombie Ride, this allowed the train to run through the circuit twice, however, when the ride was relocated to Salitre Mágico, this feature was disabled.

fullText:
Drakko: The Flying Beast is a steel launched roller coaster located at Salitre Mágico in Bogotá, Cundinamarca, Colombia. The ride originally operated as Zombie Ride at Bosque Mágico in Guadalupe, Nuevo León, Mexico.

Built by Premier Rides, it is the fourth clone of Superman Ultimate Flight at Six Flags Discovery Kingdom.

The support structure was fabricated by Valley Iron.

Unlike all other iterations, this ride has two trains and a sliding station, while operating as Zombie Ride, this allowed the train to run through the circuit twice, however, when the ride was relocated to Salitre Mágico, this feature was disabled.
